---
title: virtualenv
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = FALSE,
  collapse = TRUE
    # engine.path = list(
        # python = "/usr/local/Cellar/python/3.7.4/bin/python3"
        # python = "~/anaconda3/envs/dev3/bin/python"
    # ),
    # python.reticulate = TRUE
)
# stopifnot(file.exists(knitr::opts_chunk$get("engine.path")$python))
# reticulate::use_python(knitr::opts_chunk$get("engine.path")$python)
```

******************************************************************************************

## Links

https://uoa-eresearch.github.io/eresearch-cookbook/recipe/2014/11/26/python-virtual-env/

******************************************************************************************

```sh
pip install virtualenv
```
